__fixture__.name: entry_row_add_root_workspace_switcher
__fixture__.scenario: Inside an active workspace, user picks Add root from the workspace-switcher palette. The chooser emits one entry_chooser_row_record with entry_chooser_row_kind = folder, entry_chooser_surface_class = workspace_switcher_palette, entry_verb_candidate = add_root, target_kind_candidates = [local_folder, local_repo_root], resulting_mode_candidates = [workspace_with_roots], trust_posture_class = trust_per_root_admission (each new root re-evaluates trust independently), profile_default_class = unchanged (add-root never changes the active profile). Demonstrates §3 verb matrix add_root row, §4.2 row kind folder + add_root verb only on workspace-switcher surfaces, §4.7 binding rule 2.

presentation_subtitle: Add a new root to the active workspace. Trust is evaluated for the new root only.
